defaults.hook_text: HIS BODY IS YOUNGER THAN YOURS
defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Cristiano Ronaldo's face celebrating intensely, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Cristiano Ronaldo is over 40 years old but medical tests show his body has the biological age of someone in their early twenties - around 7 percent body fat and nearly 50 percent muscle mass
videos.video_script: Cristiano Ronaldo is over forty years old, but his body tells a completely different story. Doctors tested him and found just seven percent body fat, with almost fifty percent pure muscle. That is the body of an athlete in his early twenties. His heart, his bones, his reflexes, all years younger than his real age. While other players slow down and retire, he somehow keeps getting stronger. The man simply refuses to age. Which makes you wonder,
